title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Microchip Technology Ireland Limited
body: "Application number 5234  Applicant Microchip Limited objected to the name used by Microchip Technology Ireland Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 October 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Microchip Technology Ireland Limited is changed to 15946849, Ltd. "
